judges.reasoning: The render perfectly captures the requested classic donut scene with excellent materials, lighting, and depth of field. All requested elements (donut, icing, sprinkles, plate, wood table) are present and highly polished.

The render shows a complete, appetizing classic donut scene with glossy pink icing, multicolored individual sprinkles, soft dough, ceramic plate, and wooden table under soft lighting and shallow DOF. All named requirements are met at high visual quality with professional composition.
The render is flawless and visually appetizing, with perfect materials and lighting. It fully delivers the donut, plate, and table with sprinkles, exceeding expectations with its cinematic quality.
